testcase.classname: async task fetch fetches task data asynchronously
testcase.name: async task fetch fetches task data asynchronously

testcase.classname: GET /health returns ok status
testcase.name: GET /health returns ok status

testcase.classname: POST /tasks creates a task with valid input
testcase.name: POST /tasks creates a task with valid input

testcase.classname: POST /tasks creates a task with minimum valid input
testcase.name: POST /tasks creates a task with minimum valid input

testcase.classname: POST /tasks creates a task with all valid priorities
testcase.name: POST /tasks creates a task with all valid priorities

testcase.classname: POST /tasks trims whitespace from title
testcase.name: POST /tasks trims whitespace from title

testcase.classname: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is missing
testcase.name: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is missing

testcase.classname: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is empty
testcase.name: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is empty

testcase.classname: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is not a string
testcase.name: POST /tasks returns 400 when title is not a string

testcase.classname: POST /tasks returns 400 when title exceeds 200 characters
testcase.name: POST /tasks returns 400 when title exceeds 200 characters

testcase.classname: POST /tasks accepts title with exactly 200 characters
testcase.name: POST /tasks accepts title with exactly 200 characters

testcase.classname: POST /tasks returns 400 when priority is invalid
testcase.name: POST /tasks returns 400 when priority is invalid

testcase.classname: GET /tasks returns empty list when no tasks exist
testcase.name: GET /tasks returns empty list when no tasks exist

testcase.classname: GET /tasks returns all tasks
testcase.name: GET /tasks returns all tasks

testcase.classname: GET /tasks/:id returns a task by id
testcase.name: GET /tasks/:id returns a task by id

testcase.classname: GET /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task
testcase.name: GET /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id updates a task
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id updates a task

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id updates only status without changing title
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id updates only status without changing title

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id updates all valid status values
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id updates all valid status values

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id updates priority
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id updates priority

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id trims whitespace from updated title
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id trims whitespace from updated title

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when title is empty
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when title is empty

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when title is not a string
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when title is not a string

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when title exceeds 200 characters
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when title exceeds 200 characters

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id accepts title with exactly 200 characters
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id accepts title with exactly 200 characters

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when status is invalid
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when status is invalid

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when priority is invalid
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id returns 400 when priority is invalid

testcase.classname: PUT /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task
testcase.name: PUT /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task

testcase.classname: DELETE /tasks/:id deletes a task
testcase.name: DELETE /tasks/:id deletes a task

testcase.classname: DELETE /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task
testcase.name: DELETE /tasks/:id returns 404 for non-existent task
